summary: ExpireMate iteration-2 testing (admin, password reset, email verify, chat, auto-expire, receipts). Backend: 22/22 new pytest tests passed AND 34/34 original regression tests still passing (56/56 total). Verified: admin seed/login, /api/admin/* RBAC (403 for non-admins), ban/unban with banned-user 403 on /auth/me, admin reports + delete item flipping status='removed', /admin/emails outbox, forgot-password no-enumeration + dev_link issuance + email_tokens row, reset-password updates hash (old creds rejected, new accepted), expired token rejection (manually expired), send-verification + verify-email flow flipping email_verified=true, chat 403 for non-poster/non-claimer, PII scrub turns '555-123-4567' into '[redacted phone]', thread closed after status='completed' returns 400 on POST, /me/donations empty-ok, receipt PDF returns application/pdf with %PDF magic header, owner+admin allowed but third-party 403, auto-expire updates active items with past expiration_date to status='expired'. Frontend: /admin renders with 3 tabs (Reports, Users, Outbox) for admin and redirects non-authenticated to /login; /forgot-password renders, submits, shows dev_link inline; /reset-password renders; /verify-email renders and surfaces 'Invalid or already-used token' for bad token; Dashboard shows Donations tab with [data-testid='dashboard-tab-donations']; Login page has 'Forgot your password?' link.
action_items: [Optional] _auto_expire_task is created on startup but never cancelled in the shutdown handler — add `_auto_expire_task.cancel()` in the shutdown event for clean teardown.
[Optional] server.py is now 884 lines — split into routers (auth, items, admin, payments, chat, donations) per the previous review comment.

[Optional] forgot-password timing leak: the existing-email branch performs an extra insert + email-log compared to the non-existent branch — observable timing difference defeats no-enumeration intent. Consider doing the same number of writes in both branches or running the work in background.

[Optional] Spec says non-admin user logged in should be redirected from /admin to '/'. Verified that logged-out user is redirected to /login. Code review of AdminPage.jsx confirms the redirect rule; not verified end-to-end with a non-admin logged-in user, so a quick self-check is recommended.

[Optional] dashboard-send-email-verify button is conditionally hidden when the user is already email_verified=true (admin seed is verified) — this is correct behavior, not a bug, but worth documenting.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py (884 lines) — exceeds 700-line guideline, split into routers.
_auto_expire_task lifecycle: not cancelled on FastAPI shutdown — orphan task on hot reload.
/api/auth/forgot-password timing-side-channel for user-existence enumeration (see action item above).
PII scrub only strips US phone numbers; emails, addresses, SSNs etc. still pass through. Acceptable for v1 but document.
reset_password silently invalidates the token regardless of new_password validity ordering — Pydantic validates min_length=6 first, so OK.

receipt_pdf: when tx.user_id is None (anonymous donation), any logged-in user could download the receipt (the `if tx.get('user_id') and ...` check short-circuits). Confirm desired behavior — should probably 404 instead.

Admin seed updates role/verified/email_verified on every startup but never re-hashes the password if ADMIN_PASSWORD env changes — admins rotating the env var would still need the original password to log in. (Playbook expectation is to update password if changed.)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 5 new pages render; admin RBAC redirect verified for logged-out; login has forgot-password link; dashboard has donations tab + testids)

test_credentials: Admin: admin@expiremate.com / ExpireMate2026!  | Test users created per run: poster_<ts>@expiremate.com, claimer_<ts>@expiremate.com, other_<ts>@expiremate.com (all password Test1234, all auto-verified via direct Mongo flip).
seed_data_creation: Tests insert one paid donation transaction directly into payment_transactions to exercise /me/donations + receipt PDF, then delete it. They also insert a past-dated item to exercise the auto-expire logic, then delete it. Test users + a few items + email_tokens rows remain in DB (TEST_ / poster_ / claimer_ prefixes).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Two regression suites: /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (34 tests, original MVP) and /app/backend/tests/test_new_features.py (22 tests, iter-2 features). Run both with `pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v`. Admin login uses ADMIN_EMAIL/ADMIN_PASSWORD from backend/.env. Auto-expire is tested by direct DB write + replicating the loop body (the real 30-min loop is hard to wait for). Receipt PDF needs a manually-inserted paid payment_transactions doc. For frontend, all new pages have data-testid; admin user dropdown link is menu-admin; dashboard tabs use dashboard-tab-{posts,claims,donations}; receipt download buttons use donation-receipt-{sid}. dashboard-send-email-verify only renders when user.email_verified === false (admin doesn't see it).
rca of the issue: No issues found this iteration — all 5 features pass the acceptance criteria listed in the review request.
